nl_query: What is the total maximum marks per question paper?
failed_sql: SELECT qp.id, qp.title, SUM(q.max_marks) AS computed_total FROM question_paper qp JOIN question q ON q.qp_id = qp.id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM question q2 WHERE q2.parent_question_id = q.id) GROUP BY qp.id, qp.title ORDER BY qp.id;
error: Validation failed (semantic): LEFT JOIN on alias 'q' is nullified by 'WHERE q.id = ...' which eliminates NULL rows. Move the filter into the ON clause: LEFT JOIN ... ON ... AND q.id = ..., or change to INNER JOIN if zero-match rows should be excluded.
